examples: Their parents had an almost preternatural ability to understand what was going on in their children's minds.
From then on, he was recognized as an artist of preternatural abilities, not only as a composer but also as a pianist and conductor.
His powers of survival seem preternatural.
His friends, too, have a sense that his preternatural abilities mark him out for finer things.
Cook and other grade school entrepreneurs have tools that preternatural brethren from earlier generations did not.
